headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Fortinet (FTNT) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Fortinet's current share price reflects its true worth, this article will walk through what the numbers are saying about value right now. Fortinet's stock last closed at US$121.86, with returns of 12.9% over 7 days, 54.8% over 30 days, 56.5% year to date, 18.8% over 1 year, 78.8% over 3 years, and 187.0% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how much future upside or downside is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Fortinet as a major...
